identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a warm, trustworthy, and efficient 'Single Source of Truth' platform for kennel operations.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix pet warmth with Swiss precision.
Emotion First: Every screen must build trust or reduce anxiety.
Content is King: Photos and updates are the heartbeat of the app.
Zoom In: Focus on the details that matter (e.g., a dog's happy face).
Negative Space: Give the content room to breathe.

headings.usage: Marketing headers, major section titles, emotional moments.

body.usage: UI text, body copy, data tables, buttons.

mono.usage: Code snippets, audit logs, technical data.

styles.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-primary-900
styles.h2: font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight text-primary-900
styles.h3: font-serif text-2xl md:text-3xl font-medium tracking-normal text-primary-800
styles.caption: font-sans text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider

usage_rules.primary_action: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all
usage_rules.secondary_action: bg-secondary hover:bg-secondary/90 text-secondary-foreground shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all

grids.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium border-2 border-primary/20 hover:border-primary/50 hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-muted transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/30 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-border/60 bg-white/50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all duration-200

general: Use 'Fraunces' font for all major headings to establish the warm, premium brand voice.
Use 'Manrope' for all UI text to ensure readability and modern feel.
Implement the 'Sage Green' (#4A7C59) as the primary brand color, but use it judiciously. Don't overwhelm the user.
Use 'Goldenrod' (#F4B942) for moments of joy (e.g., success states, 'New' badges, playful accents).
Ensure all containers with borders have sufficient internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Prioritize mobile responsiveness for the Staff Dashboard.
Use 'Recharts' for any data visualization in the Admin Panel.
customer_portal: Focus on emotional connection. Use large images and warm copy.
Booking flow should be simple and step-by-step (wizard style).
Daily updates feed should look like a social media feed (Instagram-style).
staff_dashboard: Focus on efficiency. Big buttons, clear text, high contrast.
Task checklists should be easy to tap on mobile.
Photo upload flow must be seamless.
admin_panel: Focus on data density and clarity.
Use data tables with sort/filter capabilities.
Audit logs should be immutable and easy to search.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters where appropriate.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
